text.title: Brainstorming Techniques Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: a 6-person product team uses Brainwriting 6-3-5 to find activation-time wins.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: PM convenes 6 people for a 35-min 6-3-5 session targeting 'reduce new-user activation time from 12 min to <5 min'. Output is a scored shortlist for the next planning cycle.

section.title: Inputs
section.code: { "problem": "How might we reduce new-user activation time from 12 min to <5 min?", "participants": [ "PM", "designer-1", "designer-2", "engineer-1", "engineer-2", "ops" ], "technique": "brainwriting-6-3-5" }

section.title: Output
